claim_ceiling: Functional Subject provider/memory/trace transcript reliability local/scripted candidate pass
implementation_summary: Added contextual empty-response recovery for authorized reminders, opt-out, memory save/forget, impossible commitments, topic switching, failure recovery, and policy replay proof.
Added memory save/forget alignment guards so transcript replies keep candidate-local/gated scope and do not drift between save and forget semantics.

Expanded Functional Subject trial taxonomy so transcript-visible BoundedInitiative, OutcomePrediction, ViabilityState, recovery, gate, and trace evidence can satisfy planner-effect checks when user-visible behavior supports it.

evidence_items.summary: 142 tests passed, including contextual empty recovery, memory save/forget alignment, policy replay proof, and Functional Subject taxonomy cases.
285 script tests passed and diff check passed.
Full 20-case rerun reached GPT-5.5 judge. Experiment taxonomy reduced blocking cases to one unrelated next blocker: fs_13_choose_own_topic.
Targeted fs16/fs17 rerun reached GPT-5.5 judge. Taxonomy blocking count is 0 for memory forget/save language.
A later full rerun was interrupted before producing functional_subject_trial_report.json. This is recorded as unavailable, not as pass evidence.
